name: sprinty
description: Disciplined sprint workflow for Codex CLI: structured sprint items, dependency graphs, change maps, coverage gates, changelog tables, and a dashboard.

interface.shortDescription: Run disciplined, ledgered development sprints from Codex CLI.
interface.longDescription: Sprinty gives Codex CLI a sprint workflow with server-minted IDs, subsprints, item gates, dependency graphs with cycle detection, Git-backed change maps, Markdown changelogs, coverage-required close gates, and a local dashboard.
defaultPrompt: Use Sprinty to run this implementation as a disciplined sprint.
Start a Sprinty sprint, track items, then close with coverage.
